description_long: This is a large, modern brick house with three above-ground stories, surrounded by a brick wall and a well-maintained yard. The front features a prominent entryway with an arched doorway, a small porch, and a driveway leading to an attached garage with a car parked outside. The house has a mix of flat and gable roofs, with multiple large windows, including floor-to-ceiling glass panels at the rear, providing ample natural light. The backyard includes a green lawn, mature trees, shrubs, and a covered patio or gazebo structure. The exterior is primarily composed of reddish brick, with black and gray roofing elements and white window frames. The property is enclosed by a brick fence with metal gates, and the landscaping is neatly organized with paved walkways and garden beds.
description: A large, modern brick house with three stories, attached garage, and landscaped yard enclosed by a brick fence. Features include large windows, a covered patio, and a mix of flat and gable roofs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, arched porch, attached garage with a car, and the brick fence with a metal gate.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, mature trees, shrubs, and large glass windows, with the covered patio visible on the right.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the expansive backyard, covered patio, and the rear glass doors leading to the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage, and side access to the backyard, with the car and additional garden space visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and floor-to-ceiling glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main entry with a small porch, steps, and a decorative overhang, flanked by brick columns and adjacent to the garage.
